---
format: {}
title: Stats with Clojure
author: Karthikeyan A K
toc: true
toc-depth: 4
number-sections: true
theme: quarto

---
<style></style><style>.printedClojure .sourceCode {
  background-color: transparent;
  border-style: none;
}
</style><style>.clay-limit-image-width .clay-image {max-width: 100%}
.clay-side-by-side .sourceCode {margin: 0}
.clay-side-by-side {margin: 1em 0}
</style>
<script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.6.0.min.js" type="text/javascript"></script><script src="https://code.jquery.com/ui/1.13.1/jquery-ui.min.js" type="text/javascript"></script>
# Visualizations

## The Human Vision

<https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Eye>

<https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Visual_system>

![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/d/d0/Three_Main_Layers_of_the_Eye.png)

![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/b/bf/Human_visual_pathway.svg)

## Napoleon's Invasion of Russia

<https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/French_invasion_of_Russia>

![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/50/Jacques-Louis_David_-_The_Emperor_Napoleon_in_His_Study_at_the_Tuileries_-_Google_Art_Project.jpg/500px-Jacques-Louis_David_-_The_Emperor_Napoleon_in_His_Study_at_the_Tuileries_-_Google_Art_Project.jpg)


![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/9/9e/Retreat_of_Napoleon_Army_from_Moscow_1812.jpg)

![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/29/Minard.png/1280px-Minard.png)


## London's Cholera Epidemic

<https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/1854_Broad_Street_cholera_outbreak>

![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/a/a4/Barker--John_Snow--1847.jpg)

![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/27/Snow-cholera-map-1.jpg/960px-Snow-cholera-map-1.jpg)

![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/03/John_Snow_Pub_1.jpg/960px-John_Snow_Pub_1.jpg)

![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/cd/Pump_Handle_-_John_Snow_.jpg/960px-Pump_Handle_-_John_Snow_.jpg)


## Florence Nightingale's Statistical Diagrams

<https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Florence_Nightingale>

![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/ab/Florence_Nightingale_%28H_Hering_NPG_x82368%29.jpg/960px-Florence_Nightingale_%28H_Hering_NPG_x82368%29.jpg)

![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/1/17/Nightingale-mortality.jpg)





```{=html}
<div style="background-color:grey;height:2px;width:100%;"></div>
```



```{=html}
<div><pre><small><small>source: <a href="https://github.com/scicloj/stats_with_clojure/blob/main/notebooks/visualizations.clj">notebooks/visualizations.clj</a></small></small></pre></div>
```
